zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey Watkins於1500年9月27日出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特霍爾維爾時，他的父親John Thomas Watkins27歲，母親Elizabeth Lee25歲。他於1519年與Catherine Symonds在英國英格蘭多瑟特霍爾維爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1584年7月22日在他的家鄉享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey Watkins于1500年9月27日出生在英国英格兰多瑟特霍爾維爾时，他的父亲John Thomas Watkins27岁，母亲Elizabeth Lee25岁。他于1519年与Catherine Symonds在英国英格兰多瑟特霍爾維爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1584年7月22日在他的家乡享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Watkins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Watkin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Watkin
meanings: English and Welsh: from the personal name Watkin, a diminutive of Walter .

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey Watkins was born on 27 September 1500, in Holwell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Thomas Watkins, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Lee, was 25. He married Catherine Symonds in 1519, in Holwell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 22 July 1584, in his hometown, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey Watkins est né le 27 septembre 1500, à Holwell, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Thomas Watkins, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lee, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Symonds en 1519, à Holwell, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1584, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey Watkins am 27. September 1500 in Holwell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Thomas Watkins 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Lee 25. Er hat 1519 in Holwell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Catherine Symonds geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Juli 1584 im Alter von 83 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Watkins è nato il il 27 settembre 1500 nel Holwell, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Thomas Watkins, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Lee, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Symonds nel 1519, nel Holwell, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 22 luglio 1584, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey Watkinsが1500年9月27日にイギリスイギリスドールセトホールウエルで生まれた時，父John Thomas Watkinsは27歳，母Elizabeth Leeは25歳であった。1519年にイギリスイギリスドールセトホールウエルでCatherine Symondsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1584年7月22日に故郷で83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey Watkins(이)가 1500년 9월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 홀웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thomas Watkins(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Lee(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 홀웰에서 Catherine Symonds(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1584년 7월 22일 그의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.27 September 1500–22 July 1584: 27 de setembro de 1500–22 de julho de 1584
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Watkins nasceu em 27 de setembro de 1500, em Holwell, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Thomas Watkins, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lee, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Symonds em 1519, em Holwell, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de julho de 1584, em sua cidade natal, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey Watkins родился 27 сентября 1500 г. в местности холвелл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Thomas Watkins было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lee, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Symonds в 1519 г. в местности холвелл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 22 июля 1584 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 83 лет.

es.27 September 1500–22 July 1584: 27 de septiembre de 1500–22 de julio de 1584
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey Watkins nació el 27 de septiembre de 1500, en Holwell, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Thomas Watkins, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Lee, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Catherine Symonds en 1519, en Holwell, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 22 de julio de 1584, en su pueblo, a la edad de 83 años.
